content.text: Pulled successfully. Fast-forwarded from `23fb6a9` to `ac8225a` with 22 files changed, including new packages (`x402-services`), contract tests, conversation logs, and updates to the agent and skills.

message.content: merge everything into main - make sure the celo-self microlending branch is overriding everything that is now on main

content.text: Let me check the current state first.

input.command: git branch -a --list '*main*' && echo "---" && git log --oneline main..HEAD | head -20

content.content:
main
  remotes/origin/main
---
ac8225a Add image-generation skill to agent deploy flow
c1d76d2 Update micro-lending skill to EIP-7702 and Candide integration
23fb6a9 Add chain switch to Celo for delegation, LI.FI widget fixes, copy wallet
9b7e231 Replace fund step with LI.FI cross-chain widget in monitor view
908dd43 Update README.md to Reflect New Agent Microlending Protocol
476bcda Refactor AgentMicrolending and Bootstrap Skills for Enhanced Functionality
f3a5082 Replace permissionless with direct Privy + Candide 7702 integration
000c832 Switch to EIP-7702 + Candide for gasless smart accounts on Celo
50859e1 Refactor agent to integrate Privy wallet and enhance gasless operations
283a832 Enhance AgentMicrolending with ERC-20 support and OpenRouter integration
7dd597c Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/3d-asset' into feat/celo-self-microlending
7a558d0 Make retro Mac colorful and fun with rainbow stripe, candy keycaps, floppy disk
68b4060 Align frontend, agent skills, and config with AgentMicrolending contract
886dcb0 Merge remote-tracking branch 'origin/feat/celo-self-microlending' into 3d-asset
3ff3978 Add visual polish and details to retro Mac 3D asset
35e382c style: fix section comments in AgentMicrolending
211efc3 chore: remove backup file
cac5d1a style: format AgentMicrolending contracts
209fb75 feat: add integration tests and deployment script for AgentMicrolending
7cdbb15 feat: add view functions to AgentMicrolending

input.description: Check if main has commits not in feature branch

content.text: Main has no commits that aren't already in the feature branch, so this is a straightforward fast-forward. I'll checkout main and merge with the feature branch overriding everything.

input.command: git checkout main && git merge feat/celo-self-microlending
input.description: Checkout main and merge feature branch

These are just warnings about missing environment variables on Vercel, not build errors. You need to add these env vars in your Vercel project settings:

- `RAILWAY_API_TOKEN`
- `RAILWAY_PROJECT_ID`
- `PRIVY_APP_ID`
- `PRIVY_APP_SECRET`
- `CELO_RPC_URL`
- `PIMLICO_API_KEY`
- `CANDIDE_API_KEY`
- `CANDIDE_SPONSORSHIP_POLICY_ID`

Go to **Vercel → your project → Settings → Environment Variables** and add them there. Is there an actual build error further down in the logs, or is it just these warnings?
The build task needs the env vars listed so Turborepo includes them in the build environment. Let me also check what the web app actually uses.

content.content:
1→NEXT_PUBLIC_REOWN_PROJECT_ID=your_reown_project_id_here
     2→
     3→# Railway API (for agent deployment)
     4→RAILWAY_API_TOKEN=
     5→RAILWAY_PROJECT_ID=
     6→
     7→# Privy (for agent agentic wallets — server-side only)
     8→PRIVY_APP_ID=
     9→PRIVY_APP_SECRET=
    10→
    11→# Self protocol verification
    12→NEXT_PUBLIC_SELF_ENDPOINT=https://your-domain.com/api/verify
    13→
    14→# Celo RPC
    15→CELO_RPC_URL=https://forno.celo.org
    16→
    17→# Pimlico (ERC-4337 bundler + paymaster for gasless transactions)
    18→PIMLICO_API_KEY=
    19→
    20→# Telegram defaults (used when frontend fields are left empty)
    21→TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=
    22→TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS=
    23→

file.content:
NEXT_PUBLIC_REOWN_PROJECT_ID=your_reown_project_id_here

# Railway API (for agent deployment)
RAILWAY_API_TOKEN=
RAILWAY_PROJECT_ID=

# Privy (for agent agentic wallets — server-side only)
PRIVY_APP_ID=
PRIVY_APP_SECRET=

# Self protocol verification
NEXT_PUBLIC_SELF_ENDPOINT=https://your-domain.com/api/verify

# Celo RPC
CELO_RPC_URL=https://forno.celo.org

# Pimlico (ERC-4337 bundler + paymaster for gasless transactions)
PIMLICO_API_KEY=

# Telegram defaults (used when frontend fields are left empty)
TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN=
TELEGRAM_ALLOWED_USERS=

content.content: The file /Users/limone/Documents/builders-garden/synthesis-hack/turbo.json has been updated successfully.

content.text: Added all the env vars to the `build` task's `env` array in `turbo.json`. This tells Turborepo to pass them through to the build and include them in the cache key, which should clear those warnings.
